creator: ice@extreme.hu
text:
Where the point is, any recent-ish (unported) Citrix clients do not work with rl9, so I for one have to be sticking with c7 for the time being.

PVS Studio, as far as I can tell at least, works perfectly fine with c7.

--- a/devel/linux-pvs-studio/Makefile
+++ b/devel/linux-pvs-studio/Makefile
@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ LICENSE_PERMS=        dist-mirror pkg-mirror auto-accept
 
 ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=        amd64
 
-USES=          linux:rl9 shebangfix
+USES=          linux shebangfix
 
 USE_LINUX=     base curl strace
 
(I don't particularly have a vested interest in this being committed as PVS Studio is trivial to install from tarballs and I'm fine with doing that, just putting it out there.)
